summary: Frontend-only verification of StrataViz static site. Verified Tailwind color fix: orange sv brand color (rgb(255,90,0)) now renders on nav Get StrataViz button, contact email button, and recommended (Windows) download card button. Contact email button shows STRATAVIZSPORTS@GMAIL.COM with href='mailto:stratavizsports@gmail.com'. Downloads section renders 3 cards (windows, mac_apple_silicon, mac_intel) with correct hrefs: Windows -> GitHub releases exe; Mac Apple Silicon and Mac Intel -> customer-assets-v7afamib.emergentagent.net .dmg URLs. Recommended pill count = 1 (Windows detected). Hero, navbar, downloads and contact sections all visually render correctly (dark theme + silver/orange accents, no invisible black-on-black buttons observed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static site (no backend). All key testids verified: nav-download-button, contact-email-link, downloads-section, download-card-{windows|mac_apple_silicon|mac_intel}, download-button-{...}. Lenis smooth scroll used; scroll_into_view_if_needed works fine. Note: contact heading 'Tech Issues? Questions?' is visually present but get_by_text(exact=False) returned is_visible=false likely due to text-transform/CSS split across lines — confirmed via screenshot. Not a bug.
rca of the issue: Previous bug (orange elements invisible) was caused by duplicate 'colors' key in tailwind.config.js overwriting theme.extend.colors.sv. Fix (merging keys) is confirmed effective: computed backgroundColor of contact-email-link and nav-download-button both equal rgb(255, 90, 0).
